textPlain: How about this one:Assume an arbitrarily high coefficient of friction between all surfaces. Can you stack the blocks on the table such that at least one block is wholly below the top of the table?I think I have an answer to this, but I've only worked it through in my head.
Even better solutions which are interesting to visualize were proved optimal in 2007.https://chris-lamb.co.uk/posts/optimal-solution-for-the-bloc...
